name: COMBIFLAM TAB 15
description: A combination of ibuprofen and paracetamol used to treat various pain conditions including joint pain, headaches, dental issues, and post-operative discomfort.
dosage: Minimum 6-hour gap between doses; maximum 3 tablets in 24 hours; not recommended beyond 4 days without medical consultation.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C. Keep out of reach of children.

name: CONTIFLO CAP 1*10
description: Used to treat benign prostatic hyperplasia and erectile dysfunction in patients already taking Tamsulosin and Tadalafil concomitantly.
uses: Improved urinary flow in prostate conditions
dosage: Take approximately one hour before sexual activity; follow physician's direction.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: CONTIFLO ICON 0.4 1*10TAB
description: Treatment for benign prostatic hyperplasia (BPH) symptoms including frequent urination, pain during urination, and incomplete bladder emptying.
dosage: 0.4mg once daily taken after meals, preferably at consistent times.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, protected from direct sunlight, moisture and heat.

name: COREX DX 100ML
description: Combination medication used to relieve cold symptoms, including cough, sneezing, and a runny nose.
uses: Temporary relief from cough due to throat irritation
dosage: Take as directed by the doctor with a maximum of four doses in 24 hours. Shake well before use.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a clean and dry place.

name: CORTIROWA OD 9MG 1
description: A steroid-based anti-inflammatory medicine that helps reduce swelling, redness, and irritation, used for inflammatory bowel disease and related conditions.
dosage: Individual dosing determined by doctor. Swallow whole with water — do not cut, open, or chew.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, protected from moisture and heat.

name: COSCORIL DROPS 1*10ML
description: Oral drop formulation used as a cough cold preparation.

name: CRINA-NCR 15 MG 1*5TAB
description: Hormonal medicine containing norethisterone, used to treat menstrual and gynaecological problems mainly due to hormonal imbalance.
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; swallow whole with water at a fixed time daily.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C, protected from light and moisture.

name: DALACIN C 300 CAP
description: An antibiotic medication used for treating serious bacterial infections by inhibiting bacterial protein synthesis and growth.
dosage: Take as directed by your doctor with or without food; do not cut, break, or chew the capsule.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C in a clean and dry place.
